methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $60M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same-stage peers in Climate & Energy. Range: $120M - $5.0B.

data.narrative:
TS Conductor is a Series B-stage climate and energy company that has raised $60M to date. The valuation analysis draws from a comparable universe of six private peers in the same sector and stage, including Commonwealth Fusion Systems, Pano AI, Sage Geosystems, Reverion, and CarbonCapture Inc., alongside one public comparable (LNZA). The peer set spans a wide range: $120M to $5.0B, reflecting significant heterogeneity in the climate-tech landscape.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis, using total raised as a proxy base and applying a 1.9x multiplier typical for Series B advancement, yields $114M. Peer-median valuation across the six same-stage, same-sector comparables produces $355M, with the sample median reflecting the broad distribution across the cohort. These methods triangulate to a range of $97M (low) to $408M (high), with a median implied valuation of $234M.

The analysis supports a valuation range of approximately $200M–$300M as the most defensible middle ground, balancing the stage-progression floor against peer benchmarking. Key uncertainties include the outsized influence of Commonwealth Fusion Systems ($5.0B) on peer comparables and the limited visibility into comparable company revenue multiples or capital efficiency metrics. Additional clarity on TS Conductor's technical differentiation and capital deployment trajectory would refine the range.
